TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 3, Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax tay 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: ts~…ēakńßia…£iin elő≤e…£*orj rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj *, ts~…ēakńßia…£iin elő≤e…£*orj, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw moŇčolia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ts~…ēakńßia…£iin elő≤e…£*orj, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 3, Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Mongolia ta' misuw hya' ga Tsakhiagiin Elbegdorj, aring ryax tay 18 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

(minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw moŇčolia ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a ts~…ēakńßia…£iin elő≤e…£*orj, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
